metadata.name: dice_duel
metadata.description: DiceDuel - Peer-to-peer dice wagering on Solana

accounts.name: challenger_stats
docs: Challenger's PlayerStats — guaranteed to exist from initiate_wager (M-01).
NOT init_if_needed — prevents opponent from paying rent for challenger's stats.

accounts.name: challenger_stats
docs: Challenger's PlayerStats — guaranteed to exist from initiate_wager.

accounts.name: challenger_stats
docs: Challenger's PlayerStats — guaranteed to exist from initiate_wager.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call this — permissionless

accounts.name: wager
docs: The stale wager to close. Must be Pending + nonce stale.
`close = challenger` zeroes the discriminator (prevents resurrection) and sends rent to challenger.

accounts.name: challenger_stats
docs: Challenger's PlayerStats — used to verify staleness

accounts.name: vrf_program_identity
docs: SECURITY: Validates callback is from the real VRF program.
In test builds, any signer is accepted to enable integration testing
of the settlement path without a real VRF oracle.

accounts.name: vrf_program_identity
docs: SECURITY: Validates callback is from the real VRF program.
In test builds, any signer is accepted to enable integration testing
of the settlement path without a real VRF oracle.

accounts.name: challenger_stats
docs: Challenger's PlayerStats — init_if_needed for first-time players.
Required to read/write wager_nonce and pending_nonce.

accounts.name: wager
docs: New wager account — unique PDA with nonce.
Uses `init` (NOT init_if_needed) — every wager is unique.
PDA seeds use the current wager_nonce value (before increment in handler).

accounts.name: prev_wager
docs: Optional: previous stale pending wager to close and reclaim rent.
REQUIRED when challenger_stats.pending_nonce.is_some().

accounts.name: prev_escrow
docs: Optional: previous wager's escrow to refund.
Required when prev_wager is provided.

accounts.name: settler
docs: Anyone can call settlement once VRF result is available

errors.name: GamePaused
errors.msg: Game is currently paused

errors.name: SelfWager
errors.msg: Cannot wager against yourself

errors.name: BagExhausted
errors.msg: Dice bag has no uses remaining

errors.name: BagNotOwned
errors.msg: Dice bag not owned by challenger

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid wager amount

errors.name: GameTypeDisabled
errors.msg: Game type is disabled

errors.name: InvalidChoice
errors.msg: Invalid choice for this game type

errors.name: WagerInProgress
errors.msg: An active wager is in progress — cannot overwrite

errors.name: InvalidWagerStatus
errors.msg: Wager is not in the expected status

errors.name: WagerExpired
errors.msg: Wager has expired

errors.name: WagerNotExpired
errors.msg: Wager has not expired yet

errors.name: VrfNotTimedOut
errors.msg: VRF timeout has not been reached

errors.name: EscrowBalanceMismatch
errors.msg: Escrow balance mismatch

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceed maximum (10000)

errors.name: InvalidInitialUses
errors.msg: Initial uses must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidTimeoutConfig
errors.msg: VRF timeout must exceed wager expiry

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized — admin only

errors.name: DuplicateAccounts
errors.msg: Duplicate accounts — challenger and opponent must differ

errors.name: InvalidGameTypeName
errors.msg: Invalid game type name length

errors.name: VrfResultNotAvailable
errors.msg: VRF result is not available yet

errors.name: WagerStale
errors.msg: Wager is stale — challenger has created a newer wager

errors.name: PreviousWagerRequired
errors.msg: Previous pending wager must be cleaned up before creating a new one

errors.name: WagerNonceMismatch
errors.msg: Previous wager nonce does not match pending_nonce — wrong wager passed
